fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Create in Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → Create credentials → API key (enable YouTube Data API v3 first)

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via a small search query

metadata.summary: YouTube Data API v3 for searching videos, fetching channel statistics, retrieving playlists, comments, and trending content.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to Google Cloud Console (console.cloud.google.com)
2. Create a project or pick an existing one
3. Navigate to APIs & Services → Library
4. Search for 'YouTube Data API v3' and click Enable
5. Go to APIs & Services → Credentials → Create credentials → API key
6. Copy the API key and paste it here

Free quota: 10,000 units/day (each search costs 100 units, a video lookup costs 1 unit).
